questions.prompt: [LLM Fundamentals] Which control is most appropriate in this scenario 1?
questions.rationale: Defense must combine preventative control and observable detection to be operationally reliable.
questions.why_others_wrong: Disabling logs removes visibility; trusting user priority enables override; exposing secrets increases blast radius.
questions.misconception: One control is enough without monitoring.

questions.prompt: [Prompt Injection] Select ALL valid defensive actions for case 1.
questions.rationale: Robust defense is layered across ingestion, execution, and monitoring planes.
questions.why_others_wrong: Storing raw secrets in prompts increases leakage risk and violates secure design.
questions.misconception: Security controls can ignore observability.

questions.prompt: [RAG Security] You detect suspicious model behavior in sandbox scenario 1. Describe attack hypothesis, immediate containment, detection additions, and long-term hardening.
questions.rationale: Scenario responses are graded on completeness, ordering, and operational feasibility.

questions.misconception: Incident response ends at containment.
